_comment: Reasonix 0.53.x's bundled runtime only fires PreToolUse and PostToolUse despite docs listing UserPromptSubmit/Stop. We map PostToolUse->idle as the closest available 'turn-ish ended' signal — it fires once per tool call, so a multi-tool turn flickers working->idle several times. Herdr's done-notification dedup smooths the UX in background workspaces.

PreToolUse.description: herdr: report working before each tool call

PostToolUse.description: herdr: report idle after each tool call (best approximation: reasonix 0.53 doesn't fire Stop)
